summary: End-to-end testing of WhatsApp Jobs Group Finder. Backend: 16/17 pytest tests passed (94%). Frontend: all critical UI flows verified — hero, stats bento, ticker, region filters, groups grid (32 cards), card actions, submit-form validation, and scan trigger w/ beam-loader banner all work.

minor.issue: When a scan is already running, the endpoint returns 200 'already_running' BEFORE validating the regions payload. Sending invalid regions (e.g. ['Mars']) during an active scan is silently accepted instead of returning 400. Fix: validate regions before checking is_running.

action_items: Reorder /api/groups/discover so region validation runs before the already_running short-circuit (minor).
Note: pytest report-tests hid 2 seeded groups (1 via 2x 'approval', 1 via 2x 'invalid'). Total open dropped from 32 → 30. Main agent may want to reseed or note this for demo/regression.
Consider adding category=jobs validation (currently any string is accepted).
Backend has no rate-limit on /report — a single user can spam reports and hide a group quickly (intended for crowd-verify but could be abused).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: /api/groups/discover validates region only after the is_running short-circuit — switch order.

server.py /report: increments using doc-snapshot value, then checks thresholds with the same snapshot+1. Concurrent reports could race (both see count=1, both increment to 2, status updates twice). Acceptable for current scale but consider $inc with findAndModify.
frontend SubmitGroupForm: only checks 'chat.whatsapp.com' substring client-side — backend correctly enforces regex; OK.
GroupCard: 'reported' state is local — page refresh resets it; user can spam reports across reloads. Consider client-side dedup via localStorage or backend IP/session tracking.
Home.jsx polling uses 2.5s interval which is fine, but no cap on poll duration — if scan hangs, it polls forever. Add a max timeout / failure state.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: No new seed data. Existing 32 seeded groups used; 2 of them are now hidden/invalid due to report-flow tests (expected side-effect).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live in /app/backend/tests/test_wa_jobs.py and cover regions, list/filter, stats, scan trigger+polling, submit (invalid + idempotent valid), and reports (works/approval-hide/invalid-hide/404). Frontend test script verified hero, bento stats, region filter chips, group cards with join+3-report buttons, invalid-link toast, and Find-Groups scan banner with beam loader. The only failing assertion was input-validation ordering on /api/groups/discover when a scan is already running.
rca_of_the_issue: test_discover_invalid_region failed because TestDiscovery.test_discover_starts kicks off a real background scan; the very next test then posts to /api/groups/discover, but server.py checks scan_state.is_running BEFORE validating req.regions, returning 200 'already_running' instead of 400 'Unknown regions'. Fix: move the `invalid = [r for r in regions_ if r not in REGIONS]` block ahead of the `state.is_running` early-return.
